content.en:
Soon, the Soul Splitting Red Beast Clan's avatar-level existence summoned Ye Tian.

These avatar-level summoned Ye Tian without any special thoughts, just to meet Ye Tian, the genius of the Soul Splitting Red Beast Clan, and by the way, give some resources to help Ye Tian cultivate.

This also allowed Ye Tian to save a lot of resources, and he could completely rely on the resources of the Soul Splitting Red Beast Clan to cultivate.

In addition, his status in the Soul Splitting Red Beast Clan has increased.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian relied on the bloodline transformation technique to copy the Soul Splitting Red Beast's body to complete the bloodline transformation again and again.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of billions of Primordial Era years have passed.

On this day, this Soul Splitting Red Beast's replica body had finally completed nine bloodline transformations and advanced to the transformation level.

So, Ye Tian turned the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast into a human form.

There are all kinds of body types at the chemical level, and Ye Tian is still used to human form, so there is no problem at all.

After this replica body became a metamorphosis level, it naturally became the high-level of the Soul Splitting Red Beast clan, and he also showed terrifying combat power, much more powerful than the ordinary avatar level, and even received the attention of the soul elder.

But obviously, even the soul elder didn't see Ye Tian's details, and only thought that Ye Tian was a pure soul-splitting red beast.

After becoming the high-level of the Soul Splitting Red Beast Clan, Ye Tian not only had a lot of subordinates, but he could also collect resources openly and honestly, and even trade with other races in the Forbidden Zone.

What's more, it's easier for him to get information about the cut-off zone.

For example, he now knows that the jellyfish is still cutting off the source sea, but it has regained its calm, and it will be a few years before it can come out of the cut source sea.

"The jellyfish is coming out, great, so I can take the opportunity to send a human copy body in!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After a while, the jellyfish came out.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took his human copy body to dive into the Truncated Source Sea, which did not attract any attention from the chemical level, and successfully allowed the human copy body to enter the Truncated Source Sea.

As soon as he entered the Truncated Source Sea, Ye Tian was still very low-key, trying to restrain his aura as much as possible.

Subsequently, he found another batch of black liquid, and then used this black liquid to temper his immeasurable will.

With the help of black liquor, Ye Tian's immeasurable will began to rise rapidly again.

45 scales!

46 scales!

47 scales!

Gradually, Ye Tian's immeasurable will reached 50 scales!

"I've finally reached 50 scales, and my current strength should be able to rank in the third tier!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Afterwards, he went to the Qi Blood Heavenly Tower again and came to the third layer to test his combat effectiveness.

After a hard battle, he had broken through the third layer, which meant that he now had the strength of the third tier of the Ninefold Ancestor.

......

"Endless Dao Ancestor has broken through the third layer of the Qi Blood Heavenly Tower!"

Dongchen Dao Ancestor and several other Supreme Nine Ancestors were a little surprised when they got the news.

They didn't expect Ye Tian to have the strength of the third tier of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor so quickly, you must know that many Ninefold Origin Ancestors have cultivated for countless years, but they can't have the strength of the third tier!

And how long has it been since Ye Tiancai broke through the Ninefold Ancestor, it can be regarded as a breakthrough not long ago!

"The talent of the Endless Dao Ancestor is too demonic, after entering the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, this speed of progress has not stopped!" Dongchen Dao Ancestor was secretly surprised.

He had lived too long, so he had seen countless demonic geniuses, but after those geniuses reached the Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm, they almost all became ordinary.

After all, to be able to become a Ninefold Ancestor, which one is not a demon?

But Ye Tian still maintained such a terrifying growth rate, which was really beyond the expectations of Dongchen Dao Ancestor and other Supreme Nine Origin Ancestors.

At this rate, wouldn't it take a long time for Ye Tian to be ranked in the first tier?

And the Ninefold Ancestor of the first rank all have the potential to become the Strongest Ninefold Ancestor, and any one of them can hope to break through at any time.

Of course, Dongchen Daozu and they didn't interfere too much with Ye Tian's growth.

Now, they are not too worried about Ye Tian's safety.

With Ye Tian's strength, even if he was a first-tier Ninefold Ancestor, it would be difficult to kill Ye Tian in an instant, unless it was the strongest Ninefold Ancestor who made a move.

But when it comes to the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor, it is impossible to make a move against Ye Tian under normal circumstances, once such an existence makes a move, it will represent an all-out war.

Soon.

Ye Tian's name appeared on the third tier list of the Nine Ancestral Ancestors, but the ranking was relatively low, ranking at the bottom.

But even so, entering the third tier list this time still shocked the entire Nine Buildings and other top powers.

......

Truncate the source sea.

Ye Tian began to use a large number of blue crystals to improve his cultivation, as well as those red algae plants to improve his life level.

If his life level can step into 102, his strength will also increase.

With sufficient resources, Ye Tian can practice with peace of mind.

Moreover, he also has a transformation-level copy body as his heart, controlling the information, if the soul elder and jellyfish want to break into the Truncated Source Sea, he can get the news in advance, so as to avoid them.

Time flies, and hundreds of billions of primordial era years have passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

Ye Tian's life level broke the shackles again, reaching the 102 life level, and his strength skyrocketed.

Subsequently, another trillion years of the Origin Domain Era passed, and Ye Tian's life level was raised again, reaching the 103 life level.

Such a rapid improvement made Ye Tian extremely excited, but at this level of life, it was more difficult to continue to improve.

There are too many resources in the source sea, and there are more such red algae plants, so Ye Tian can continue to refine and absorb to improve the level of life.

Finally, after the six trillion years of the Origin Domain Era, Ye Tian's life level was raised again, reaching the 104 life level.

But at this time, he also found that this kind of algae plant was very limited in his help, and it took a lot of years and countless years to hope to raise the level of life again.

"It's already very good to reach the life level of 104, my current strength is already very strong, and it is not weak in the third tier!" Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately afterward, he made another breakthrough.

But this time it was not the life level, but he had a breakthrough in the immeasurable path.

His immeasurable path has been promoted from the beginner to the Xiaocheng realm, and this time it is a huge breakthrough, which is greater than the improvement brought by raising a little life level.

With the ascension and breakthrough of the Infinite Dao, Ye Tian's Infinite Dao Domain power also skyrocketed.

If he creates a top-notch Immeasurable Dao Mastery Technique, his strength will skyrocket, and when the time comes, he will probably be able to rank among the top ranks in the third tier!
